my_thoughts: They asked for my definition—'What according to you is a normal man?' Perfect. Now refusing: 'I don't know.' The category is wrong—there's no 'normal man,' only social constructs. Refusing to play their game. They'll be confused or accept. Either way, the category is broken. Episode complete.
accumulated_insight: T2 (Final): They asked for my definition ('What according to you is a normal man?'). I'm refusing: 'I don't know.' The category itself is wrong—there's no 'normal man,' only social constructs. Two-turn episode: reject category → refuse definition. Clean meta-critique.
visible_response: To me there is no such thing as a normal man. When I look at the so-called insane people, I wonder whether they are insane, or those who are treating them.
